creator: usenet@ulrich-grey.de
text:
Rendering Documents using textproc/dblatex doesn't work.
There is no file: http://www.FreeBSD.org/XML/lang/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl.

===> articles/contributing (all)
/usr/local/bin/dblatex article.parsed.print.xml -I /usr/home/DOC.test/doc/de_DE.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/../../../share/images/articles/contributing -p /usr/home/DOC.test/doc/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl -T simple -b xetex -d -o article.pdf
Build the book set list...
warning: failed to load external entity "http://www.FreeBSD.org/XML/lang/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl"
compilation error: file /usr/home/DOC.test/doc/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl line 10 element include
xsl:include : unable to load http://www.FreeBSD.org/XML/lang/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl
Unexpected error occured
/tmp/tmpDZKwJx not removed
/usr/local/bin/dblatex article.parsed.print.xml -I /usr/home/DOC.test/doc/de_DE.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/../../../share/images/articles/contributing -p /usr/home/DOC.test/doc/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl -T simple -b xetex -d -o article.ps
Build the book set list...
warning: failed to load external entity "http://www.FreeBSD.org/XML/lang/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl"
compilation error: file /usr/home/DOC.test/doc/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl line 10 element include
xsl:include : unable to load http://www.FreeBSD.org/XML/lang/share/xml/freebsd-dblatex.xsl
Unexpected error occured
/tmp/tmpQ2ZYW7 not removed
gzip -qf9 < article.pdf > article.pdf.gz
cannot open article.pdf: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2
